hero.text:
Locked, 15 minutes to kickoff: Spain ML at even money.

Someone asked me this morning for the sharp side of this game. Here it is —

12 of the 20 winning wallets we track took Spain.
Our soccer card this week: 9-3, +16.8 units.

Portugal has the legend.
The money has Spain.
hero.rtLine: Portugal has the legend. The money has Spain.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: For anyone new: we don't cap games — we track the small group of bettors who actually win and post where their money goes. Belgium tonight is the other soccer read on the board, still live until 15 min before kickoff. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0706s
